extraction.one_line_summary: THOMAS Geraint attacked solo with 700m remaining out of final corner, barely held off charging COLBRELLI by centimeters for stage win and 10-second bonus.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS exploited sharp technical corners in final kilometer when field expected straightforward sprint, attacked exiting final turn solo.
Quick-Step controlled breakaway tempo all day to protect ASGREEN's GC position, forcing breakaway splits rather than allowing it distance.
Late breakaway joiners CERNY and MULLEN fresher than original five, immediately attacked to split group when peloton closed gap.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: Timed corner attack perfectly at 700m after poor TT previous day, showed pure power to nearly hold off pure sprinter.
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: neutral: Quick-Step willing to spend entire stage controlling to protect his third-place GC despite earlier crash.
rider_signals.COLBRELLI Sonny: positive: Fastest finisher in race to this point, closed impossible gap but ran out of road by two feet.
rider_signals.WELLENS Tim: negative: 32-time winner caught out tactically when late joiners attacked, missed critical split in breakaway with 60km remaining.
rider_signals.POSTLEBERGER Lucas: positive: Defended 1-second GC lead over LUTSENKO despite minimal team support through technical finale and time bonus opportunities.
